title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Capital Float Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at Capital Float Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Join the Capital Float Ventures Solutions family as a Frontend Developer in Nashik. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Capital Float Ventures Solutions:
Capital Float Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Capital Float Ventures Solutions!
